title: SANJAYOVACHA | The Silent Crisis Of The Rise In Urban Noise Pollution | Sanjaya Baru
description: Mention should be made that sustained neighbourhood noise has a deleterious impact on the learning abilities of children and youth studying at school, college or at home. In fact, most urban neighbourhoods are no longer conducive to serious reading and study and the education of the young. How can one expect students to focus and concentrate on their studies when they are constantly subject to noise from loudspeakers in the neighbourhood?
